## Summary

Describe the change and the behavior it affects.

## Related Issues

Fixes #

## Checklist

- [ ] No credentials, live endpoint IDs, private hostnames, or private paths are added.
- [ ] Routing, guard, or billing behavior remains deterministic and explainable.
- [ ] Destructive provider behavior is fail-closed and policy-gated.
- [ ] Job examples remain safe placeholders.
- [ ] Documentation is updated for user-visible behavior or configuration changes.
- [ ] `make check` passes locally or equivalent CI output is attached.
